portfolios.name: Bitcoin Long-Only
portfolios.description: 100% BTC on weekly BUY signal. 100% SGOV (T-bill ETF, ~5% yield) on SELL. Signal: 2-of-3 momentum (EMA20/55, RSI14, MACD) on weekly bars. Simulated from January 2019.
portfolios.cash_instrument_desc: iShares 0-3 Month Treasury Bill ETF (~5% annualized yield)
portfolios.disclaimer: Simulated performance based on historical signals. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

portfolios.name: Tech Software Alpha
portfolios.description: Equal-weight across top IGV holdings with weekly BUY signal. Max 15% per stock. Cash to SGOV (~5% yield). Rebalances every Monday. Universe: 40 stocks. Benchmark: IGV.
portfolios.disclaimer: Simulated performance. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

portfolios.name: Natural Resources Alpha
portfolios.description: Equal-weight across top IGE holdings with weekly BUY signal. Max 20% per stock. Cash to SGOV (~5% yield). Rebalances every Monday. Universe: 40 stocks. Benchmark: IGE.
portfolios.disclaimer: Simulated performance. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

portfolios.name: Semiconductor Alpha
portfolios.description: Dollar-volume weighted across top SOXX holdings with individual weekly BUY signals. Non-BUY stocks are excluded and their weight redistributed. 100% SGOV only when zero stocks signal BUY. Universe: 25 stocks. Benchmark: SOXX.
portfolios.disclaimer: Simulated performance. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

portfolios.name: Global Macro Rotation
portfolios.description: Equal-weight across 18 global asset classes — equities, bonds, gold, Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP — using monthly BUY signals. Only holds assets in active monthly uptrends. Rotates to SGOV when assets flip SELL. Rebalances monthly.
portfolios.disclaimer: Simulated performance. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
